credential.label: GitHub Credential
credential.helpText: Select a GitHub credential or create a new one

metadata.label: Extraction Configuration
metadata.description: Configure what to extract from GitHub

organization.label: Organization Name
organization.helpText: GitHub organization or user account to extract from

repositories.label: Repositories
repositories.helpText: Specific repositories to extract (leave empty for all). One per line.

extract_wiki.label: Extract Wiki Pages
extract_wiki.helpText: Clone and index wiki pages from repositories

extract_yaml.label: Extract YAML Files
extract_yaml.helpText: Extract and index YAML configuration files

extract_sbom.label: Extract SBOM (Software Bill of Materials)
extract_sbom.helpText: Generate and extract dependency graphs using GitHub's SBOM API

sbom_poll_interval_seconds.label: SBOM Poll Interval (seconds)
sbom_poll_interval_seconds.helpText: How often to check SBOM generation status

preflight-check.label: Run Preflight Check
preflight-check.helpText: Validate credentials and permissions before extraction
